title: deal.closed (v1)
description: Published by the Approvals Service when a user marks a deal as sold or it is auto-detected as sold. History Service writes the final immutable record; Catalogue Service updates the SKU composite score. See TDD Sections 3.2.1, 5.4, 5.7.

approval_id.description: The original approval record for the deal.

user_id.description: The user who closed the deal.

actual_sell_price_gbp.description: The final sale price received on the sell channel.

net_profit_gbp.description: Final net profit after all fees, shipping, and VAT adjustments.

closed_at.description: Timestamp when the deal was closed.
